testTitle: HP Police Constable Full Mock Test 9
customInstructions: This mock test strictly follows the latest HP Police Constable Exam Pattern.
Total Questions: 90, Total Marks: 90, Total Time: 120 Minutes.
Every incorrect answer will deduct 0.25 Marks (Negative Marking).
Questions are available in both English and Hindi.

questions.questionEn: Identify the part of speech of the underlined word: She ran <u>quickly</u> to the station.
Identify the part of speech of the underlined word: The book is <u>on</u> the table.
Fill in the blank with the correct tense: He _____ to the gym every morning.
Fill in the blank with the correct tense: I _____ my homework before he arrived.
Change the voice: "She is singing a song."
options: A song is sung by her.
A song was being sung by her.
A song is being sung by her.
A song has been sung by her.

questions.questionEn: Change the voice: "Who broke the window?"
options: By whom the window was broken?
By whom was the window broken?
By who is the window broken?

questions.questionEn: Change into Indirect Speech: The teacher said, "The sun rises in the east."
options: The teacher said that the sun rose in the east.
The teacher said that the sun rises in the east.
The teacher ordered that the sun rises in the east.
The teacher asked if the sun rises in the east.

questions.questionEn: Change into Indirect Speech: He said to me, "Are you coming?"
options: He asked me if I was coming.
He told me that I was coming.
He asked me if I am coming.
He said to me that are you coming.

questions.questionEn: Choose the correct article: He is ____ MLA.
Choose the correct article: She plays ____ guitar well.
Choose the correct determiner: I don't have ____ money.
Choose the correct determiner: Can I have ____ water, please?
Spot the error in the sentence: "One of the boy is missing."
Spot the error in the sentence: "I prefer tea than coffee."
Spot the error in the sentence: "She has been working here from 2020."
Change the voice: "Close the door."
options: You are ordered to closing the door.

questions.questionEn: Change into Indirect Speech: He said, "I have passed the examination."
options: He said that he has passed the examination.
He said that he had passed the examination.
He told that he passed the examination.
He said that I had passed the examination.

questions.questionEn: Identify the part of speech of the underlined word: <u>Although</u> he was sick, he came to work.
Fill in the blank with the correct tense: Look! The train _____.
Choose the correct article: He is ____ honest man.

questions.questionHi: हिंदी वर्णमाला में मूल स्वरों की संख्या कितनी है?
'क, ख, ग, घ, ङ' - ये किस प्रकार के व्यंजन हैं?
'कमल' का सही पर्यायवाची शब्द है:
'आकर्षण' का विलोमार्थी शब्द क्या है?
'जो कभी न मरे' के लिए एकार्थी शब्द है:
'कनक' शब्द के दो मुख्य अनेकार्थी अर्थ कौन से हैं?
'बुढ़ापा' शब्द में कौन सी संज्ञा है?
'जो करेगा सो भरेगा।' वाक्य में 'जो-सो' किस प्रकार का सर्वनाम है?
'मुझे चार लीटर दूध चाहिए।' इस वाक्य में 'चार लीटर' किस प्रकार का विशेषण है?
'बच्चा रोता है।' यह किस प्रकार की क्रिया है?
'वह अचानक चला गया।' वाक्य में 'अचानक' क्या है?
मुहावरा 'आसमान टूट पड़ना' का क्या अर्थ है?
लोकोक्ति 'अधजल गगरी छलकत जाय' का सही अर्थ है:
options: कम ज्ञान होने पर अधिक दिखावा करना

questions.questionHi: 'आ, ई, ऊ' किस प्रकार के स्वर हैं?
'श, ष, स, ह' किस प्रकार के व्यंजन हैं?
'आग' का पर्यायवाची शब्द है:
'आयात' का विलोमार्थी शब्द क्या है?
'जो ईश्वर को न मानता हो' के लिए एक शब्द:
'गंगा' शब्द कौन सी संज्ञा है?
'नौ दो ग्यारह होना' मुहावरे का अर्थ है:

options: National Film Award / राष्ट्रीय फिल्म पुरस्कार

questions.questionHi: $0.625$ को इसके सरलतम रूप में भिन्न (Fraction) में बदलें।

questions.questionHi: लंबाई 15 सेमी और चौड़ाई 10 सेमी वाले आयत का परिमाप क्या है?

questions.questionEn: The Total Surface Area of a solid hemisphere of radius '$r$' is:
questions.questionHi: त्रिज्या '$r$' वाले एक ठोस अर्धगोले (hemisphere) का कुल पृष्ठीय क्षेत्रफल होता है:

questions.questionHi: 5 सेमी भुजा वाले घन का आयतन ज्ञात कीजिए।

questions.questionEn: Find the odd one out from the following figures:
questions.questionHi: निम्नलिखित आकृतियों में से विषम चुनें:

questions.questionEn: Find the next number in the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
In a row of boys, Rahul is 10th from the left end and 15th from the right end. How many boys are there in the row?
questions.questionHi: लड़कों की एक पंक्ति में, राहुल बाएँ छोर से 10वें और दाएँ छोर से 15वें स्थान पर है। पंक्ति में कुल कितने लड़के हैं?

questions.questionEn: A farmer has some hens and cows. If the total number of heads is 30 and the total number of legs is 100, how many cows are there?

questions.questionEn: Find the next letter in the alphabet series: A, C, E, G, ?

questions.questionHi: समानता - पेन : लिखना :: चाकू : ?

questions.questionEn: Pointing to a man, a woman said, "He is the brother of my son's father." How is the man related to the woman?
